source_note: Pricing as of late 2025. Market share from Steam Developer Survey 2024.

engines.name: Unity
engines.license_note: Runtime fee removed 2024; revenue tiers still apply
engines.platforms: PC · Mac · Linux · iOS · Android · Console · Web · VR
engines.verdict: Best overall for indie devs and mobile

engines.name: Unreal Engine 5
engines.license_note: Royalty on shipped commercial products only
engines.platforms: PC · Mac · iOS · Android · Console · VR
engines.verdict: Best for cinematic 3D and AAA-quality games

engines.name: Godot 4
engines.platforms: PC · Mac · Linux · iOS · Android · Web
engines.verdict: Best free option — especially for 2D and learners

engines.name: GameMaker
engines.license_note: One-time $149.99 also available; free tier limited
engines.platforms: PC · Mac · iOS · Android · Console · Web
engines.best_for: 2D pixel art games, beginners, small indie titles
engines.verdict: Best for 2D pixel art and beginner makers

engines.name: Construct 3
engines.best_for: Browser games, absolute beginners, rapid prototyping
engines.verdict: Best for pure beginners — zero coding required

engines.name: RPG Maker MZ
engines.license_note: No royalties; asset packs sold separately
engines.best_for: JRPG-style games, story-driven RPGs, visual novels
engines.verdict: Best for JRPGs and story-driven games without coding
